posts.raw_content:
Alabama’s new Secretary of State, Wes Allen is scoring points with election integrity activists. He  withdrew the state from the ERIC voter registration system. Last week while in the Washington D.C. area for the 2023 NASS Winter Conference. It’s the annual meeting for all Secretary of States. he decided to visit the published address for ERIC’s headquarters. That address is 1201 Connecticut Ave. NW, Ste 600, Washington, DC 20036.

Allen said, “Since I was in town, I went to see the ERIC Headquarters. What I found was that there was no ERIC headquarters at that address. There were no employees. There were no servers. There was no ERIC presence of any kind. Instead. I found a virtual office that is rentable by the day. What it was missing was people, servers and any sign of the ERIC team.”  -BY WILLIAM QUINN  FEBRUARY 25, 2023  www.GeorgiaRecord.com
https://www.georgiarecord.com/dirty-south/2023/02/25/eric-empty-alabama-secretary-of-state-wes-allen-visits-eric-headquarters-in-washington-dc-but-nobody-was-there-there-were-no-servers-there-were-no-computers-there-were-no-employees/
